scripts.dev: npm run copy:bundle && npm run copy:schema && docusaurus start
scripts.start: npm run build:resources && npm run copy:bundle && npm run copy:schema && docusaurus start
scripts.build: npm run build:resources && npm run copy:bundle && npm run copy:schema && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 docusaurus build
scripts.start:windows: npm run build:resources:windows && npm run copy:bundle && npm run copy:schema && docusaurus start
scripts.build:windows: npm run build:resources:windows && npm run copy:bundle && npm run copy:schema && docusaurus build
scripts.copy:bundle: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='../dist/browser/codegen.browser.mjs';const dst='./static/codegen.browser.mjs';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync('./static',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied browser bundle to static/');}else{console.log('Browser bundle not found at '+src+'. Run npm run build:browser first.');}"
scripts.copy:schema: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='../schemas/configuration-schema-0-with-docs.json';const dst='./src/schemas/configuration-schema.json';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied configuration schema');}else{console.log('Schema not found at '+src);}"
scripts.build:resources:windows: npm run move:docs:windows && npm run build:api:windows
